query: SELECT fullName, gamesPlayed, ppg, rpg, apg, fgPct FROM players WHERE fullName IN ('Luka Dončić', 'Shai Gilgeous-Alexander', 'LeBron James', 'Stephen Curry') ORDER BY ppg DESC LIMIT 10
